answers.value: I am Michael. I'm building an AI-powered CRM for local plumbers.
Plumbers spend too much time on paperwork instead of fixing pipes.
We are currently developing the core scheduling engine.
Just me, I am technical but looking for a cofounder.
Launch MVP and get 10 paying customers.
I spoke to 50 plumbers and they all hate paperwork.
Plumbers are incredibly underserved by modern software.
